top_signals.title: PBOC Surprises by Releasing No Rate on Debut Overnight Operation
top_signals.summary: China’s central bank held its debut overnight reverse repo operation without disclosing the rate of interest it charged on its new instrument, in a surprise move to traders awaiting guidance on borrowing costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Serena Williams looking forward to enjoyable and nervous return to Wimbledon
top_signals.summary: The 44-year-old American will face Australia's Maya Joint in the first round on Centre Court on Tuesday, marking her first appearance at Wimbledon since 2022.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chinese spies and smuggled drugs fuel Takaichi’s security push
top_signals.summary: Across a range of industries, Japan's economic-security vulnerabilities have been on display in a slew of recent incidents.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
